explanation: This command uses sqlcmd.exe to execute a query that selects the top 1 record from the [VeeamBackup].[dbo].[Credentials] table. It matches the Sigma rule by including 'SELECT', 'TOP', and the specific table name.
This command is a variation using the -q option instead of -Q to execute the same query. The Sigma rule does not distinguish between -Q and -q, making this a valid test command.
This command adds a server parameter (-S localhost) to the original query. The Sigma rule does not exclude this variation, so it still matches the detection criteria.
This command includes the -E option for trusted connection authentication. The Sigma rule does not exclude this variation, so it still matches the detection criteria.
This command includes explicit username (-U) and password (-P) parameters. The Sigma rule does not exclude this variation, so it still matches the detection criteria.
